title: Intellia Therapeutics (NTLA) Q4 2024 Earnings Call Highlights: Strategic Advancements and Financial Position
text: Intellia Therapeutics ended 2024 with approximately $861.7 million in cash and marketable securities, down from $1 billion the previous year. The company reported collaboration revenue of $12.9 million in Q4 2024, a significant improvement from negative $1.9 million in the same period of 2023. Operating expenses increased during the quarter, with R&D spending reaching $116.9 million (up from $109 million year-over-year) and G&A expenses at $32.4 million. Management expects a 5% to 10% year-over-year decline in GAAP operating expenses for 2025 following January's restructuring announcement. The company is advancing three Phase 3 programs and expects to complete enrollment in its hereditary angioedema (HAE) study during the second half of 2025. For its transthyretin amyloidosis program (Nex-z), Intellia presented positive extended follow-up data from its Phase 1 trial showing deep and sustained TTR reduction. The firm received regenerative medicine advanced therapy (RMAT) designation for Nex-z. Intellia anticipates three product launches between 2027 and 2030, with commercial infrastructure buildout already underway. The company's cash balance is expected to fund operations into the first half of 2027.
